about.title: Shaping Futures
about.description: London School is your local center for foreign language learning and technology education for children, teenagers, and adults.

history.title: Our History
history.subtitle: The journey of London School from 2019 to today

2019.title: The Beginning
2019.description: London School started as a small language learning center in Mitrovica, founded by English teacher Albina Hoti, to bring quality foreign language education to local youth.

2021.title: Growth & Expansion
2021.description: With rapid student growth, we expanded our curriculum with English, German courses and first steps in technology. We introduced small group classes and learning through practical experiences.

2024.title: Partnership with Logiscool
2024.description: Recognizing the importance of technology education, we partnered with international school Logiscool to bring international certification in innovative programming courses: Python, JavaScript and Blox, further enriching our academic offerings.

today.title: A Thriving Community
today.description: Today, London School welcomes hundreds of students each year, with trained teachers and a modern campus in Mitrovica, a space dedicated to interactive and creative learning.

whatWeOffer.title: What London School Offers
whatWeOffer.description: Interactive methods, experienced teachers, and programs prepared according to international standards. Our mission is to help students gain confidence, practical skills, and opportunities for the future.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To empower students with the languages and technical skills needed to succeed in a global, digital-first world while fostering creativity, critical thinking, and cultural awareness.

values.title: Our Values
values.description: The principles that guide everything we do

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We strive for the highest standards in education and student achievement.

passion.title: Passion
passion.description: Our educators are passionate about inspiring and nurturing young minds.

global.title: Global Perspective
global.description: Preparing students for success in an interconnected world.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Embracing cutting-edge teaching methods and technology.

impact.title: Our Impact
impact.description: Numbers that reflect our commitment to excellence

team.title: Meet the People Behind
team.description: Passionate educators and innovators dedicated to transforming lives through education

founder.name: Dr. Maria Johnson
founder.bio: With over 15 years of experience in international education, Dr. Johnson founded London School with a vision to bring world-class language and technology education to Mitrovica. Her passion for empowering students has shaped our innovative approach to learning.
founder.education: PhD in Educational Leadership, Cambridge University
founder.achievements: Established partnerships with Logiscool • Trained 500+ students • TOEFL Expert Instructor

english.name: Sarah Williams
english.bio: Native English speaker with CELTA certification and 10 years of teaching experience in TOEFL preparation.

german.name: Klaus Schmidt
german.bio: Native German speaker with Goethe Institut certification and expertise in language immersion programs.

tech.name: Alex Rivera
tech.bio: Full-stack developer and Logiscool certified instructor specializing in making coding fun for all ages.
